creator: crest@rlwinm.de
text: There are several process supervisors available in ports that could be used instead of daemon. It should be enough to declare a runtime dependency on it and use it instead of daemon in your rc.d script(s). The better ones e.g. s6/runit/daemontools support sending signals to the supervised processes and can capture their stdout/stderr into a pipe connected to a logging process this can be a proxy to syslog (or something better).
